title: Nothing Happens
description: The prison holds its breath. Footsteps fade. For a moment, you are alone.

title: Monster Patrol
description: Boots scrape stone nearby. Something hungry is sweeping the corridor.

effects.message: A patrol forces you to duck aside — you lose a card from your hand.

title: Find Herbs
description: A patch of bitter prison moss grows between the stones. It steadies the nerves.

effects.message: You gather herbs and recover a discarded card.

title: Hidden Treasure
description: A loose brick hides a forgotten stash. Someone meant to come back for this.

effects.message: You pocket a small cache and recover two discarded cards.

title: Ambush
description: Shapes drop from the rafters. You fight free, but not without cost.

effects.message: An ambush costs you dearly — two cards are lost from hand.

title: Lost Prisoner
description: A half-mad inmate whispers of doors you have not yet found.

effects.message: The lost prisoner points toward nearby chambers.

title: Collapsed Corridor
description: Stone groans and dust fills the air. The way behind you is briefly sealed.

effects.message: Falling rubble forces a hard scramble — you discard a card.
